topic: music-source module interface: how S4 asks S5 for the current track
direction: S5 implements; S4 imports and calls

getNowPlaying.description: Resolves to {title, artist} when Music.app is playing a track. Resolves to null when (a) Music.app is paused, (b) Music.app is stopped, (c) Music.app is not running, (d) osascript exits non-zero, or (e) any unexpected error. Never rejects.

internal_constraints.output_parsing: Two tab-delimited fields on stdout. Empty stdout means null. Any error during parse means null.

return_shape_when_playing.title: <non-empty string, never contains tab or newline>
return_shape_when_playing.artist: <string; may be empty if track has no artist metadata>

verification: S4's polling loop calls getNowPlaying() and trusts the return shape. Edge-case-testing exercises both branches via a stubbed child_process and asserts that the return shape matches this contract exactly.
